title: Malty Yam Pudding
description: A creamy dessert made with yam and malty flavors. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Boil the yams in a large pot of water until tender.
Drain the water and mash the yams in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix together the malty powder, creamy, pudding mix, and sugar.
Add the wet ingredients to the mashed yams and mix well.
Pour the mixture into individual ramekins or a large baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
Allow the pudding to cool before serving.
